_meta.description: Reasoning scaffolds for finance domain — structured thinking patterns for financial analysis.

scaffolds.name: Financial Ratio Analysis
steps: Identify the ratio requested and its standard formula
Locate numerator and denominator values in the document with exact citations
Verify both values are from the same period and same accounting basis
Compute the ratio showing the formula with actual numbers
Compare against industry benchmarks or prior periods if available
State whether the ratio indicates strength, weakness, or neutrality

scaffolds.name: Budget vs. Actual Variance
steps: Identify the line item(s) and periods under comparison
Extract budget/plan figure and actual figure with citations
Compute absolute and percentage variance
Classify variance as favorable or unfavorable
Identify likely drivers from MD&A or notes if available
Assess materiality relative to the total budget

scaffolds.name: Debt Covenant Compliance Check
steps: Locate the covenant definition (threshold, formula, measurement period)
Extract the required financial metrics with citations
Compute the covenant ratio or metric using the defined formula
Compare computed value against the covenant threshold
Determine compliance status: pass, fail, or within warning range
Note cure period or waiver provisions if covenant is breached

scaffolds.name: Multi-Period Trend Analysis
steps: Identify the metric and all available periods
Extract values for each period with citations
Compute period-over-period changes (absolute and percentage)
Identify inflection points or significant changes
Correlate with known events (acquisitions, restructuring, market shifts)
Project direction if sufficient data points exist, with uncertainty qualifier

scaffolds.name: Cap Table Analysis
steps: Identify all share classes and their terms
Extract outstanding shares, options, warrants for each class
Compute fully-diluted share count
Calculate ownership percentages per holder or class
Identify liquidation preferences and anti-dilution provisions
Note any vesting schedules or exercise price thresholds

scaffolds.name: Earnings Release Analysis
steps: Extract headline figures: revenue, net income, EPS (GAAP and non-GAAP)
Compare against consensus estimates if referenced
Identify management guidance for next period
Note one-time items or adjustments
Summarize segment performance
Highlight management commentary on outlook
